news.t: Cambria Announces Launch of Cambria US EW ETF (USEW); Joins TAX, ENDW, and GEW as Cambria's Fourth 351 ETF Exchange
Cambria Announces Launch of Cambria Global EW ETF (GEW); Joins TAX and ENDW as Cambria's Third 351 ETF Exchange
Cambria to Launch Global Equal Weight ETF (GEW) with Potential for Tax-Deferral Opportunity for Appreciated Securities via 351 ETF Exchange

overview.description: The Cambria Endowment Style ETF (ENDW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is inspired by the investment strategies of endowment funds. This ETF is actively managed to provide exposure to global asset classes including equities, fixed income, real assets, and alternatives, while maintaining an aggressive risk profile. ENDW was launched on Apr 10, 2025 and is issued by Cambria.
